recent_excerpts: Socket identified 108 malicious Chrome extensions that infected 20,000 users, stealing Google and Telegram session cookies and injecting ads via a shared command-and-control server.
Ivanti patches two medium-severity flaws in its Neurons for ITSM platform that could allow authenticated attackers to hijack user sessions or retain unauthorized access to the system.
The new 'Storm' infostealer exfiltrates encrypted browser data for server-side decryption, enabling session hijacking and bypassing MFA. Analysis by Varonis details the technique.
